All functions

dMweibull() pMweibull() qMweibull() rMweibull() hMweibull()

The Modified Weibull Distribution (MWD)

OmerliDam

Omerli Dam Data

Reliability_Clayton_MWD()

Stress-Strength Reliability of MWD under Clayton copula

TerkosDam

Terkos Dam Data

WLSE_clayton_onestep()

One-step WLSE estimate of the Clayton copula parameter

fit.SSR.ClaytonMWD()

Estimating parameters of SSR Model with MWD Marginals via Clayton Copula

fitClayton()

Estimating parameter of the Clayton copula

fitMWD()

Estimating parameters of the Modified Weibull Distribution (MWD)

fitWD()

Estimating parameters of the two-parameter Weibull distribution

parametric_bootstrap()

Parametric Bootstrap Confidence Intervals

print(<SSRfit>)

Print SSR.ClaytonMWD Fit Results

rMweibull_Clayton()

Bivariate Random Data Generation for MWD Marginals via Clayton Copula

theta_Ktau_estimate()

Kendall's Tau Estimate of Clayton copula parameter
